final:
module ALU (
    input [63:0] A,
    input [63:0] B,
    input [2:0] op_code,
    output reg [63:0] temp_result
);
    always @(*) begin
        case (op_code)
            3'b000: temp_result = A + B;          // Addition
            3'b001: temp_result = A - B;          // Subtraction
            3'b010: temp_result = A & B;          // AND
            3'b011: temp_result = A | B;          // OR
            3'b100: temp_result = A ^ B;          // XOR
            3'b101: temp_result = A + 1;          // Increment
            3'b110: temp_result = A - 1;          // Decrement
            3'b111: temp_result = A;              // Pass-through
            default: temp_result = 64'b0;         // Default case
        endcase
    end
endmodule
